# Koda API Reference

This document lists public **Koda** APIs, including operators (accessible from
`kd` and `kd.eager` packages) and methods of main abstractions (e.g.
DataSlice, DataBag, etc.).

Category  | Subcategory | Description
--------- | ----------- | ------------
[kd](api/kd.md) | | `kd` and `kd.eager/lazy` operators
 | [allocation](api/kd/allocation.md) | Operators that allocate new ItemIds.
 | [annotation](api/kd/annotation.md) | Annotation operators.
 | [assertion](api/kd/assertion.md) | Operators that assert properties of DataSlices.
 | [bags](api/kd/bags.md) | Operators that work on DataBags.
 | [bitwise](api/kd/bitwise.md) | Bitwise operators
 | [comparison](api/kd/comparison.md) | Operators that compare DataSlices.
 | [core](api/kd/core.md) | Core operators that are not part of other categories.
 | [curves](api/kd/curves.md) | Operators working with curves.
 | [dicts](api/kd/dicts.md) | Operators working with dictionaries.
 | [entities](api/kd/entities.md) | Operators that work solely with entities.
 | [expr](api/kd/expr.md) | Expr utilities.
 | [extension_types](api/kd/extension_types.md) | Extension type functionality.
 | [file_io](api/kd/file_io.md) | File I/O utilities.
 | [functor](api/kd/functor.md) | Operators to create and call functors.
 | [ids](api/kd/ids.md) | Operators that work with ItemIds.
 | [iterables](api/kd/iterables.md) | Operators that work with iterables.
 | [json](api/kd/json.md) | JSON serialization operators.
 | [json_stream](api/kd/json_stream.md) | JSON text stream transformation operators.
 | [lists](api/kd/lists.md) | Operators working with lists.
 | [masking](api/kd/masking.md) | Masking operators.
 | [math](api/kd/math.md) | Arithmetic operators.
 | [objs](api/kd/objs.md) | Operators that work solely with objects.
 | [optools](api/kd/optools.md) | Operator definition and registration tooling.
 | [parallel](api/kd/parallel.md) | Operators for parallel computation.
 | [proto](api/kd/proto.md) | Protocol buffer serialization operators.
 | [py](api/kd/py.md) | Operators that call Python functions.
 | [qtypes](api/kd/qtypes.md) | Constants for Koda QTypes.
 | [random](api/kd/random.md) | Random and sampling operators.
 | [s11n](api/kd/s11n.md) | Serialization and deserialization utilities.
 | [schema](api/kd/schema.md) | Schema-related operators.
 | [schema_filters](api/kd/schema_filters.md) | Schema filter operators and constants.
 | [shapes](api/kd/shapes.md) | Operators that work on shapes
 | [slices](api/kd/slices.md) | Operators that perform DataSlice transformations.
 | [streams](api/kd/streams.md) | Operators that work with streams of items.
 | [strings](api/kd/strings.md) | Operators that work with strings data.
 | [testing](api/kd/testing.md) | A front-end module for kd.testing.*.
 | [tuples](api/kd/tuples.md) | Operators to create tuples.
 | [types](api/kd/types.md) | Types used as type annotations in users&#39;s code.
[kd_ext](api/kd_ext.md) | | `kd_ext` operators
 | [contrib](api/kd_ext/contrib.md) | External contributions not necessarily endorsed by Koda.
 | [kv](api/kd_ext/kv.md) | Experimental Koda View API.
 | [nested_data](api/kd_ext/nested_data.md) | Utilities for manipulating nested data.
 | [npkd](api/kd_ext/npkd.md) | Tools for Numpy &lt;-&gt; Koda interoperability.
 | [pdkd](api/kd_ext/pdkd.md) | Tools for Pandas &lt;-&gt; Koda interoperability.
 | [pseudo_random](api/kd_ext/pseudo_random.md) | Pseudo-random utilities.
 | [storage](api/kd_ext/storage.md) | Koda data storage utilities.
 | [vis](api/kd_ext/vis.md) | Koda visualization functionality.
